title: festuca callosa
intro: Festuca callosa, also known as hard fescue, is a type of perennial grass native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is known for its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Festuca callosa often involve infusions or teas made from the dried grass, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
